name: electronicon
description: Electronicon is a leading German manufacturer of high-quality film capacitors and power capacitors for industrial, energy, and power electronics applications. Founded in 1992, Electronicon specializes in innovative capacitor solutions including DC-link capacitors, AC filter capacitors, and snubber capacitors for demanding applications in renewable energy, drives, and power supplies.
longDescription: Electronicon GmbH, established in 1992 and headquartered in Dessau, Germany, is a premier manufacturer of film capacitors and power capacitors for industrial and energy applications. With over 30 years of engineering excellence, Electronicon has developed a comprehensive portfolio of capacitor solutions designed for the most demanding power electronics applications. The company specializes in DC-link capacitors for inverters and converters, AC filter capacitors for power quality improvement, and snubber capacitors for protection circuits. Electronicon's products are widely used in renewable energy systems (wind, solar), industrial motor drives, traction systems, medical equipment, and power supplies. The company is known for its innovative dry filling technology, self-healing properties, and long lifetime designs. As an authorized Electronicon distributor, we provide customers with access to their full product range, technical support, and application engineering services.

coreProducts.name: DC-Link Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-performance DC-link capacitors for inverters, converters, and power electronics applications

coreProducts.name: AC Filter Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Power film capacitors for harmonic filtering and power factor correction

coreProducts.name: Snubber Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-voltage snubber capacitors for IGBT and thyristor protection circuits

coreProducts.name: Motor Run Capacitors
coreProducts.description: AC motor run capacitors for industrial and HVAC applications

seoTitle: Electronicon Capacitor Distributor | Authorized Supplier of DC-Link & Film Capacitors
seoDescription: Authorized Electronicon distributor offering DC-link capacitors, AC filter capacitors, and snubber capacitors. Technical support and fast delivery for renewable energy, drives, and power electronics.

faqs.question: Is your company an authorized Electronicon distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are an authorized distributor of Electronicon capacitors. We maintain a direct partnership with Electronicon GmbH in Germany, ensuring that all products we supply are genuine and backed by Electronicon's full warranty and technical support. Our authorization covers the complete range of Electronicon products including DC-link capacitors, AC filter capacitors, snubber capacitors, and motor run capacitors. We provide full traceability documentation and certificates of conformance with every shipment.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to request a copy of our distributor certificate or to discuss your Electronicon capacitor requirements.

faqs.question: What makes Electronicon capacitors different from other film capacitor manufacturers?
faqs.answer: Electronicon capacitors are distinguished by several key advantages: 1) German engineering excellence with over 30 years of specialized film capacitor expertise, 2) Innovative dry filling technology that eliminates oil leakage risks and enables flexible mounting positions, 3) Superior self-healing properties that ensure long lifetime and high reliability, 4) Wide voltage range from 250V AC to 6000V DC covering most power electronics applications, 5) Custom design capabilities for specific application requirements, 6) Excellent thermal performance with optimized internal geometry, 7) Comprehensive testing and quality control according to IEC 61071 standards, 8) Environmentally friendly manufacturing with RoHS compliance. Electronicon's focus on power electronics applications results in products optimized for inverter, converter, and filter applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our Electronicon product categories to find capacitors specifically designed for your power electronics application.

faqs.question: What are the main applications for Electronicon capacitors?
faqs.answer: Electronicon capacitors are designed for demanding power electronics applications across multiple industries. In renewable energy, they are used in solar inverters, wind turbine converters, and energy storage systems. Industrial drive applications include variable frequency drives, servo drives, and motor control systems. Power supply applications cover UPS systems, welding equipment, and industrial power supplies. Traction systems use Electronicon capacitors in railway propulsion systems and electric vehicle charging infrastructure. Medical equipment manufacturers rely on Electronicon for MRI systems, X-ray equipment, and patient monitoring devices. HVAC systems utilize their motor run capacitors for compressor and fan motor applications. The company's DC-link capacitors are particularly well-suited for high-power IGBT and SiC-based converters.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your specific application requirements and browse our categorized Electronicon product listings for suitable solutions.

faqs.question: What technical support do you provide for Electronicon capacitor selection?
faqs.answer: We provide comprehensive technical support for Electronicon capacitor selection and application engineering. Our services include: 1) Application engineering support to select the optimal capacitor type, voltage rating, and capacitance value for your design, 2) Thermal analysis and ripple current calculations to ensure reliable operation, 3) Lifetime estimation based on operating conditions using Electronicon's proprietary models, 4) Custom design support for specialized applications requiring non-standard specifications, 5) Spice model availability for circuit simulation and verification, 6) Sample provision for prototyping and testing, 7) Access to Electronicon's complete technical documentation including datasheets, application notes, and design guides. Our FAE team has extensive experience with power electronics applications and can provide guidance on capacitor bank design, cooling considerations, and safety requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our technical support team with your application specifications for personalized assistance with Electronicon capacitor selection.

faqs.question: What are the typical lead times for Electronicon capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Electronicon capacitors depend on the product type, specifications, and order quantity. Standard catalog products typically have lead times of 6-10 weeks from Germany. High-volume or custom-designed capacitors may require 10-14 weeks due to manufacturing and testing requirements. We maintain strategic inventory of popular Electronicon series for faster delivery on standard items. For critical applications, we can work with Electronicon to expedite production or arrange air freight delivery. Long-term supply agreements are available for customers with regular demand, ensuring priority allocation and scheduled deliveries. We recommend contacting us early in your design phase to confirm lead times and secure production slots for your requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team with your specific part numbers and delivery requirements for current lead time and availability information.

faqs.question: How can I verify the authenticity of Electronicon capacitors?
faqs.answer: We guarantee 100% authentic Electronicon capacitors sourced directly from Electronicon GmbH in Germany. To verify authenticity: 1) Check the capacitor labeling - genuine Electronicon capacitors have clear markings with the Electronicon logo, part number, date code, voltage rating, and capacitance value, 2) Review the packaging - authentic products come in Electronicon-branded packaging with proper labeling and handling instructions, 3) Request a Certificate of Conformance (COC) which we provide with each shipment, 4) Cross-reference part numbers and specifications with Electronicon's official datasheets, 5) Verify the country of origin - genuine Electronicon capacitors are manufactured in Germany. We maintain full traceability records and can provide documentation showing the supply chain from Electronicon's factory to your delivery location.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always purchase Electronicon capacitors from authorized distributors to ensure authenticity, warranty coverage, and technical support.

faqs.answer: Purchasing Electronicon capacitors through our authorized distribution channel provides significant advantages: 1) Guaranteed authentic German-made products with full Electronicon warranty, 2) Competitive pricing leveraging our distributor agreements and volume commitments, 3) Local technical support from our FAE team with deep power electronics expertise, 4) Faster delivery through our strategic inventory investment, 5) Flexible payment terms and credit options for qualified customers, 6) Value-added services including kitting, labeling, and documentation support, 7) Long-term supply agreements ensuring production continuity, 8) Access to Electronicon's engineering team for complex application support, 9) Comprehensive application notes and design resources, 10) Responsive customer service with dedicated account management. Our partnership with Electronicon ensures you receive the highest level of product support and technical expertise.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us today to discuss your Electronicon capacitor requirements and discover the benefits of working with an authorized distributor.
